description_long: This is a sleek, modern military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply pointed nose cone. The wings are low-mounted and swept back, giving it an aerodynamic profile suitable for high-speed flight. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely accommodating one or two seats. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with twin jet exhausts visible at the rear. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The exterior is primarily a light gray color, with some darker accents around the engines and landing gear.
description: A sleek, swept-wing military jet airplane with a pointed nose, low-mounted wings, twin rear jet exhausts, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical low-mounted swept wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined fuselage, cockpit placement, and visible landing gear beneath the wings and nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin jet exhausts, tail assembly, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile, landing gear, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted on either side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
